modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern school stories need social weather: group chats, seating maps, clubs, transit, class apps, lunches, phones, and private/public self.

catalyst.logline: A class group chat turns the seating chart into a popularity map, and the protagonist's one honest reply changes who moves their chair.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=ja_JP; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'group_chat_seating_map': A class group chat turns the seating chart into a popularity map, and the protagonist's one honest reply changes who moves their chair. Transmutation: Chat status becomes belonging pressure. Market surface: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
